name: worked-examples
description: Reference cartridge: one correspondence per CorrespondenceKind, using the canonical worked examples from docs/theory/CORRESPONDENCE-MODEL.adoc. Proves the schema covers all six grades of the Echo fibre.

narrative.celebrate: You already define functions — this is the very same idea.
narrative.better: `define` is just the Scheme spelling of `def`.
narrative.safety: Same binding intent; verify before assuming it is only a rename.

residue.note: BASIC rebinds destructively; Erlang binds once and unifies — re-`=` fails a match rather than overwriting.

narrative.celebrate: You have used `=` for assignment for years — that intuition is real.
narrative.safety: In Erlang `=` is single-assignment bind / unify, not store.
narrative.example: X = 5, X = 6   %% the second match FAILS

residue.note: 0-based vs 1-based: the first element flips index.
JTV is reversible / add-only: subtraction is `add` run backwards; divide via reversed repeated-add.
Coming from assembly + JS there is no prior anchor for a static type system — teach de novo.

to.surface: x  /* last expression is the value */

residue.note: ReScript has no `return`; a block evaluates to its last expression — re-route the habit.
